title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, enabling programmatic chat, generate, embed, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama with browser and Node.js support.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and chat models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted web interface for Ollama supporting multi-model chats, file uploads, RAG and admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client library for Ollama offering synchronous/asynchronous APIs and Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for integrating Ollama models into Ruby and Rails applications.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience wrapper CLI that adds interactive model selection, conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local AI code completion and chat using Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app example consuming the Ollama REST API with streaming message support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React offering model management and chat.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and module for declarative Ollama installation with systemd service and GPU drivers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented Generation stack using Ollama, ChromaDB and LangChain for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that wraps the Ollama API with async streaming, chat and embedding support for C# applications.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot bringing local Ollama models to servers with slash commands and thread chats.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide LLM conversations.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: PyPI helper package that downloads and serves the Mistral 7B model via Ollama with one pip install.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building local LLM pipelines.
